core_theme: C# 享元设计模式：通过共享内在状态大幅减少内存占用
reader_takeaway: 理解内在/外在状态分离机制，能用享元工厂将5000个粒子的内存从320MB压缩到200KB以下
summary_angle: 享元模式以'共享池'替代'无数副本'，用极少数飞量级对象承载海量实例
main_conclusion: 拆分内在状态与外在状态，5000粒子只需3个Flyweight实例，内存节省从320MB降至<200KB
narrative_flow: 问题：大量相似对象撑爆内存 → 解法：拆出共享的内在状态 → 享元工厂池化 → 结果：5000粒子/3对象/节省99%内存

information_blocks.label: 内在 vs 外在
information_blocks.anchor: Intrinsic state: 字体/纹理等共享不变数据；Extrinsic state: 位置/大小等上下文相关数据
5000 particles but only 3 flyweight types, memory from ~320MB to <200KB

information_blocks.label: 工厂池化
information_blocks.anchor: Dictionary-based caching keyed on intrinsic state, returns existing instance or creates new

main_subject: 一名程序员面对堆满内存的重复对象，举起享元工厂将它们压缩成3个共享原型
main_subject_action: 用享元工厂将5000个粒子对象压缩成3个共享实例，内存大幅缩减
composition: 宽幅漫画分镜：左侧堆满复制对象的'内存崩溃'场景，右侧程序员操作享元工厂将对象浓缩，中部数字标注5000→3
background_elements: 代码行、内存块、粒子特效（spark/smoke/flame）
comic_style_reason: Tutorial类文章，讲的是渐进式状态分离和工厂复用流程，日漫的分镜式构图最能体现'前后对比'和'步骤推进'的叙事节奏
color_palette: 黑白墨线为主，局部蓝色（内存/数据）与橙色（粒子/火焰）点缀
final_prompt: Japanese manga wide cover illustration, aspect ratio 2.35:1, black and white ink lines with limited color. Left panel: a programmer character overwhelmed by 5000 identical glowing memory blocks/particles stacked everywhere, CPU/RAM meter going red. Center panel: a sleek factory machine labeled with Chinese characters '内在' and '外在', sorting objects into shared flyweight pools, arrow flowing down to just 3 glowing prototype objects. Right panel: the programmer relieved, 5000 particles dancing freely but sharing 3 object cores, a bold number '5000→3' floating in the air. Speed lines, manga panel borders, monochrome with orange and blue accents on particles and memory blocks. No fake UI, no chart axes, no terminal text, no main title text. Only 1-3 short Chinese labels for infographic navigation.
